message:
fix(mesh,store): correct is_final for zero-budget responses and GC zone-scoping

mesh: remove || selected_esis.is_empty() from is_final so zero-budget
responses with available symbols are not marked final, preventing peers
from prematurely stopping requests.

store/gc: split live set into visited (traversal dedup) and live
(zone-scoped). Foreign-zone objects are traversed but not marked live,
fixing incorrect retention of cross-zone referenced objects.

store/quarantine: remove unnecessary .clone() on Copy ZoneId values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
